summary: Iteration 182: Jurisdiction Flow Fixes testing complete. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend testing verified: (1) Jurisdiction warnings banner appears correctly on case detail page with missing metadata, (2) Banner has correct data-testid='jurisdiction-warnings', (3) Case with complete metadata does NOT show the warning banner, (4) Payment History page still accessible, (5) Login still works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: APPELLATE_PATHWAYS correctly contains 'federal' key with 's 35A Judiciary Act 1903 (Cth)' reference
AUSTRALIAN_STATES correctly contains 'federal' key with abbreviation='CTH' and name='Commonwealth/Federal'
STATE_FRAMEWORKS correctly contains 'federal' key pointing to FEDERAL_CRIMINAL_FRAMEWORK
validate_jurisdiction_completeness('federal', 'drug_offences') correctly returns federal jurisdiction warning about dual-jurisdiction complexity
validate_jurisdiction_completeness('', 'drug_offences') correctly returns 'JURISDICTION NOT CONFIRMED' warning
get_offence_context for federal case correctly includes Commonwealth/Federal jurisdiction reference
GET /api/cases/{case_id} correctly returns metadata_warnings and jurisdiction_warnings arrays
Case with missing state/offence_category/offence_type returns 3 metadata warnings
Case with complete metadata (state=nsw, offence_category=homicide, offence_type=murder) returns empty metadata_warnings
Case with partial metadata (missing offence_type only) returns 1 metadata warning
Frontend CaseDetail.jsx correctly displays amber warning banner with data-testid='jurisdiction-warnings' when metadata is incomplete
Warning banner correctly filters out APPEAL TIME LIMIT warnings from display
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 182 verified jurisdiction flow fixes. Key findings: (1) Federal/CTH jurisdiction now fully supported in APPELLATE_PATHWAYS, AUSTRALIAN_STATES, and STATE_FRAMEWORKS, (2) validate_jurisdiction_completeness correctly handles federal cases with dual-jurisdiction warning, (3) GET /api/cases/{case_id} returns metadata_warnings and jurisdiction_warnings arrays, (4) Test cases: case_d0f0469d5cab (state=None, offence_category=None, offence_type=None) returns 3 metadata warnings, case_f8bf63e9dcbe (state=nsw, offence_category=homicide, offence_type=murder) returns 0 warnings, case_44b2047065b2 (state=nsw, offence_category=homicide, offence_type=None) returns 1 warning, (5) Frontend correctly displays amber warning banner with data-testid='jurisdiction-warnings' when metadata is incomplete, (6) Login and Payment History still work correctly.

case_detail_warnings_banner.case_with_missing_metadata: PASS - amber warning banner displayed with data-testid='jurisdiction-warnings'
case_detail_warnings_banner.warning_content: PASS - shows 3 warnings: state not set, offence category not set, offence type not set
